nasb.text: Now suppose one of you fathers is asked by his son for a fish; he will not give him a snake instead of a fish, will he?

esv.text: What father among you, if his son asks for  a fish, will instead of a fish give him a serpent;

cnv.text: 你們中間作父親的，哪有兒子求魚，反拿蛇當作魚給他呢？

ccb.text: “你们中间做父亲的，如果孩子要饼，你会给他石头吗？要鱼，你会给他蛇吗？

csbs.text: 你们当中有哪个做父亲的，儿子要鱼，反而拿蛇当做鱼给他呢？
